title: MicroCT Protocols for Scanning and 3D Analysis of Hexaplex Trunculus
author: Eva Chatzinikolaou
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.bxwqppdw

steps.title: Sample placement inside a custom-made felisol...
steps.instruction: Sample placement inside a custom-made felisol holder without any scanning medium (in the air)

steps.title: SkyScan 1172 (micro-computed tomographer (microCT), Bruker,...
steps.instruction: SkyScan 1172 (micro-computed tomographer (microCT), Bruker, 10L01170, Detail detectability: 10,000h lifetime;Spot size https://www.brukersupport.com/ProductDetail/9196 )

steps.title: Projection images were reconstructed into cross...
steps.instruction: Projection images were reconstructed into cross sections using the SkyScan’s NRecon software (Bruker, Kontich, Belgium)

steps.title: Reconstruction parameters Smoothing
steps.instruction: Reconstruction parameters Smoothing: 2 Ring artifact correction: 20 Beam hardening correction: 59% Attenuation coefficients: 0 - 0.13 Save as: 16-bit TIFF images

steps.title: 3D Analysis using the software CT Analyser v
steps.instruction: 3D Analysis using the software CT Analyser v.1.18.4.0 (CTAn, Bruker, Kontich, Belgium)

steps.title: Creation of a Region of Interest (ROI)
steps.instruction: Creation of a Region of Interest (ROI)

steps.title: Binary thresholding with a grayscale histogram...
steps.instruction: Binary thresholding with a grayscale histogram range 30 - 255 for measuring relative shell density

steps.title: Custom processing plugin a) Thresholding
steps.instruction: Custom processing plugin a) Thresholding: 30-255 b) Despeckle: remove black speckles c) Despeckle: sweep all except the largest objects

steps.title: 3D Analysis a) Structure thickness
steps.instruction: 3D Analysis a) Structure thickness: average value of the diameters of the largest spheres which can be fitted in each point of the shell structure (“sphere-fitting” method) b) Closed shell porosity: total number of closed pores and % of the closed porosity of the shell (i.e. total volume of enclosed pores of each specimen as a % percentage of the total shell volume)

steps.title: Save colour coded images for visualisation...
steps.instruction: Save colour coded images for visualisation of the shell structure thichness using the CTVox software (Bruker, Kontich, Belgium)

steps.title: Scanning parameters for adult Hexaplex trunculus Voltage
steps.instruction: Scanning parameters for adult Hexaplex trunculus Voltage: 100 kV Current :100 μA Filter: aluminium and copper Pixel size: 13.79 μm Camera binning: 2 × 2 Exposure time: 2480 ms Rotation: 180° Rotation step: 0.60º Frame averaging: no
